events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary Beatles drummer, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Ringo's Beat
angles.copy: Eighty-six years young and still drumming up a storm! Happy birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr. What's your favourite Ringo moment, on or off the kit?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the astronomical talent that is Brian May! What's the Queen track where his guitar solo absolutely blows you away?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Still Rolling
angles.copy: Eighty-three years of rock and roll swagger! Wishing a very happy birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger. What's your ultimate Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV launched in 1981
events.blurb: MTV launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first music video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, MTV launched with the ironically titled 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Did it? Or did it just change the game forever?

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe' in 1994
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, marking a pivotal moment in Britpop.

angles.name: Britpop Debut
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the sound of a generation. What's the track that still gives you goosebumps?

events.title: Woodstock Festival took place in 1969
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Festival, a defining moment of the 1960s counterculture, took place from August 15-18, 1969.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since half a million gathered for three days of peace and music at Woodstock. If you could have been there, which artist would you have seen?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: August 16, 2026, marks 49 years since the passing of Elvis Presley, who would have been 91.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: Remembering the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, 49 years on. His music and legacy continue to inspire. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: September 13, 2026, marks 30 years since the tragic death of Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: Thirty years ago, we lost a true icon. Remembering Tupac Shakur and his profound impact on music and culture. His words still resonate today.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: September 18, 2026, marks 56 years since the passing of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84.

angles.name: Guitar Genius
angles.copy: Fifty-six years since the world lost a true guitar visionary, Jimi Hendrix. His sound redefined music forever. What's your favourite Hendrix riff?

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road' in 1969
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' in the UK on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Across The Zebra
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That cover, those songs... pure genius. What's your go-to track from the album?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Rock Rebel
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock and roll icon with attitude and unforgettable tunes. What's your favourite Pretenders song?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Britpop legend and former Oasis frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Mad For It
angles.copy: Fifty-four years of pure rock and roll. Happy birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! What's your favourite track he's lent his iconic voice to?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' re-released as a UK single in 1975
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic anthem 'Imagine' was re-released as a single in the UK in 1975, following its original album release in 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: Forty-nine years since John Lennon's timeless message of peace, 'Imagine', was re-released as a single in the UK. A song that still resonates deeply today.

events.title: Apple announced the first iPod in 2001
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: 1,000 Songs In Your Pocket
angles.copy: Twenty-five years ago, Apple announced the original iPod, changing how we listened to music forever. Who remembers their first iPod?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th marks James Bond Day, celebrating the iconic British secret agent.

angles.name: Shaken Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From the gadgets to the theme tunes, what's your favourite 007 film or moment? License to thrill, indeed.

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: October 9, 2026, marks the day John Lennon would have celebrated his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering the visionary John Lennon, who would have been 86 today. His music and message continue to inspire generations. What's your favourite Lennon song?
